name: Picnic Burritos
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the mayonnaise and taco seasoning mix.
2. Spread the mixture evenly on each tortilla.
3. Sprinkle shredded cheese over the spread.
4. Layer with turkey, tomato slices, and lettuce, leaving about 2 inches at one side covered only with the mayonnaise mixture.
5. Starting at the side with turkey, roll up each tortilla tightly.
6. To serve immediately, cut each burrito in half.
7. Or, wrap uncut burritos securely with plastic wrap and refrigerate for up to 2 hours before cutting and serving.
